passages.excerpt:
Indexed
folder 48 - 008
808

So I was a Befahltrager. I carried the message (1) of conditions in that realm; and (2), the introduction of Happy King there. That's what "Tears" did. 1) By its overall depiction -the dystopia presented- it showed that it dealt with the totally fallen realm. In fact, passing from one coaxial realm to another is discussed (i.e. presented) in it. 2) Having done this, esp. by means of the Acts material, which identifies the Xtian source of my vision, the 2-word cypher tells the news concerning that realm: the succesful introduction of the Happy King. Stunningly important news about that realm. That I was in 1970. Now, nine years later, I am told that the "work is completed." I was transformed from a Befahltrager to a Geheimnistrager. Look - I know based on my perception of the "second stereo signal" which turned this world into Paradiso that we're dealing with coaxial worlds - so it shouldn't suprise me that "Tears" and this world are coaxial. It wouldn't be just my memory that was changed, it would be everyones'. Apparently I had spoken Greek -at least scientific Greek- before the change. There was no dog and no cat. I wasn't married to Tess and didn't own the Dodge. I lieved in a cool moist high-altitude. I drank beer; I may have been a catholic.

Last edit over 5 years ago by Toso
folder 48 - 009
Indexed

folder 48 - 011
811

Compare: "The Head Apollo is about to return" with "He has been transplanted"; i.e. it isn't going to happen - it has already happened! "The work is completed." There has been a progression from the imminent to the actualized. The accomplished. In fact, there are three stages: 1) "St. Sophia is going to be born again." The future - could be a week, could be 2000 years from now. 1974. 2) "The Head Apollo is about to return; the time you've waited for has come." The near future. 1978. 3) "The work is completed. The final world is here. He has been transplanted + is alive." The anticipated event has already occurred. 1979 - just about a year after (2). + not only has it been done - it's been done successfully. A point about (3). He doesn't come to life here; he was alive elsewhere first + then "transplanted" to here. + the visual impression of the "Bill + June Black" couple expressing joy. __ I am convinced that "Ubik" is correct; we are dead + have forgotten: 1) Our original life elsewhere: "the stars" 2) Fall to the lowest level of death: The BIP 3) Where we are now. (Purgatorio) 4) If we can remember (1) + (2), upon reaching the top level of (3) we go on to 5) Paradiso - The Garden Christ is the messenger from the Kingdom of Light who wakes us up from sleep to life. (Salvation.)

Last edit over 6 years ago by Toso
folder 48 - 012
Indexed

Indexed
folder 48 - 012
812

It seems strange, on the surface, that you would go forward into the next realm by remembering the previous realm, but also you are remembering before that: when you were alive; + you are remembering the fall + your ascent back up thus far, + that you have still farther to go. You are not home yet. Memory + Self are the same thing - as "Three Women" showed. In fact memory and reality are the same thing, as the film also showed. So Self + reality are interrelated. Of course it would divide up into 3 realms: past (Inferno), present (Purgatorio) + future (Paradiso); there is always a worse part where you were, the part you're in now (middle) and the better part (future); it's not an arbitrary division. + before the first part, the BIP, lies the stars. Dante's "Comedy" is the best description of the ascent of the soul probably ever written. He places anamnesis as occurring at the top level of purgatorio, just before entering paradiso, which fits my experience. The Soul has finally reached the point where reality is restored to it because memory is restored to it. Ah. My self up to 3-74 was an epiself based on amnesia. Thomas is my true self based on memory (anamnesis) and hence different

Last edit about 6 years ago by Zebrapedia
folder 48 - 013
Indexed

Past Present Future -------------------------> a moving point.

But actually it is laid down: Future [ one ] paradise future Present [ XXX ] purgatorio, our world Past [ two ] inferno BIP "Tears" {arrow pointing to the middle area of the diagram} mixture

Inferno (Rome, Acts "Tears", BIP) lies under our mid-realm + can be retrieved through anamnesis. This views supposes that there is progressive ascending for all souls; in any case ascent is related to time, but not linear time (i.e. time as we experience it: the moving dot of the present - v. "Ubik" for much more accurate model + gnostic/Heidegger concepts of rising + sinking - also v. Bindswanger). This would be individual ascent or descent in one lifetime + would resemble time travel, with rising = the future + sinking = the past. Thus heavenly voices would = from the future + satanic voices = from the past, just as paradiso = the future, + inferno = the past. But not in the linear sense. Parmenides was the first to realize that our world is a two "signal" world; i.e. his forms 1 + 2.

Last edit over 5 years ago by Toso

folder 48 - 016

821

So to be enlightened means to shoot forward in time: from Acts ("Tears") to the top level of purgatorio: USA 1974. An apostolic Xtian was saved (via the holy spirit) + so shot forward (upward) in time! To the entrance of heaven: the top level of purgatorio. + then entered heaven (the kingdom). No, it wasn't from apostolic times. It was from a level in purgatorio that partakes more of the lower realm than the one I was moved up to; it is described in "Tears." I.e. in the present. But at a lower level of purgatorio. + I was in it in 1970 when I wrote "Tears". + so remembered it after I was moved up - remembered when I saw the Golden Fish.

"Tears" - Better - Paradiso

>-----------/---------------/--------------> 2-74 - 3-74 Where everyone else is - this mixture of the two realms

In other words, "Tears" has a higher component of signal II (inferno) than our world - so there must be a very large number of worlds. + there may be more people moving up or down the AB axis during their lifetime than I realized; what may have been exceptional in my case was entering the upper realm purely; losing the last contact with the lower realm.

Indexed
folder 48 - 024
824

first level of paradiso, + so could see the infinite One, God. What I'm more inclined to think, however, is based on Canto 33 of Paradiso of the "Commedia." Viz: "God is the book of the universe: "the same [volume of leaves] that the universe holds scattered through its maze." This relates God to the universe in a way that isn't contingent. What I did was move along an axis of some kind + encounter -one or perhaps several- of these pages of the book, as if they are very fine layers, resembling the phosphene graphics. I moved through them, along this axis, + the laws (rules) changed; I am speaking of plural coaxial worlds. Actually I am sure that I was moved as a primary condition of my level of ontology (authentic being, in Heidegger's sense, ushered in by Urangst), moved up crucially, + in fact rather suddenly - it is of extraordinary value to know that this can occur during a lifetime rather then between. It is as if the frequency of these pages become greater the closer (but not spacially!) that you get to the Source, the One - this is clearly Neo-Platonism. I seem to have passed orthogonally through a sort of realm, + I had done so once before to get here, as my anamnesis showed. At once the rules changed; I changed + world changed, + "always was [now] different," like retroactive changes.

Last edit over 6 years ago by Toso
folder 48 - 025
Indexed

Indexed
folder 48 - 027
827

Reading the "Commedia" - another parallel to 3-74: the top level of purgatorio where Dante hears Mathilde + sees Lethe + Eunoe is the Garden of Eden. So I heard, well - let' start with Eunoe or Mnemosyne: I "drank" from it, heard Mathilde singing, was led by the AI voice (Beatrice), dreamed of cyclopes + Sibyl + Blessed Fields (referring to Virgil, obviously), + found myself in the Garden of Eden, the Peaceful Kingdom. + saw Valis + the plasmate, i.e. the next level up which is paradiso, i.e. saw God (entered the postmortem realm - i.e. left this realm upon right choosing). Thus I count 8 elements pointing to my passing from purgatorio to paradiso (this is all very orphic + neoplatonist). Oh, 9: remembrance of "Tears" (inferno)! This is too many coincidences to be dismissed. Wait - I wasn't already at the top level - the Garden; I entered it. Ulna. From Virgil. + Beatrice represents heavenly wisdom - i.e. St. Sophia. The strange thing is, I've noted the elements from my own writing in 2-3-74, but even more dramatic + perplexing is the Virgil-Dante material. All I can assume is that, as Pythagoras said, we are in a kind of prison, + some sort of release + ascent back up + out is possible through metapsychosis. For me a quantum leap took place during a life time: an enlightenment like that of the Buddha. But it suggests that we are dead + in purgatory (for bad Karma acquired in one or several past lives). + what is most significant is that my 3-74

Last edit over 5 years ago by Toso
folder 48 - 028
Indexed

Indexed
folder 48 - 060
860

supported by YHWH is real, the former making up much of what we perceive (maya). (Dokos). It is part of the lie (cf "Joint"). (+ "Stigmata.") Thus I saw Valis as an invader in our world transubstantiating the irreal into the real. Assembling a real cosmos out of it. He said he would send Elijah first, on the day that he -YHWH- acted. Well, now he has acted. So Elijah must have come here - perhaps a few years ago. __ The in-breaking of God would be connected with a massive repair of the world. Suppose this repair has already been made retroactively, so that track A (the BIP) is already replaced with this track B. + in 2-74 I remembered track A ("Tears") where Xtianity was illegal + Belial ruled. "The final world is here." Alternate presents. "Tears" is how it has been but we've forgotten. Like the ending of "3 Women." Which is why it scared me so. So the 2-74 view was not of this world as it actually is, but of it as it formerly was. [No; Qv sub] __ The word I want isn't "co-axial" (v supra); it's concentric. The world of "Tears" (BIP) + the Garden (highest level of Purgatorio) + the post-mortem world (Paradiso) are concentric, + I know which theology-philosophy that points to: Plotinus + Neo-Platonism: the original fall + reascent of the soul, not spacially, but "up" through concentric rings of emanation from the One (Valis!). As with Plato, anamnesis is crucial for the rise to the next concentric level.

Last edit over 5 years ago by Toso

folder 48 - 061

Indexed
folder 48 - 068
868

The "upper" realm simply is superior to the "lower" realm in that it has power over it but not vice versa ("matter is plastic in the face of mind"). This is my "2nd signal" view, or two-source cosmology, creating 3 realms in all: pure one (BIP or hell), the second or mixed realm (Purgatorio) + then three, which is the Garden unmixed (Paradiso). They are not spacially arranged; i.e.: several worlds occupy the same space - they are what I call coaxial. This line of thought has been fundamental with me ever since I saw the "Tears" world here, superimposed to/with ours, + later the Garden - as well as Valis + the plasmate. Combining the two errors + correcting them gives us this: The visible (phenomenal) world is the real world only partially seen, not a different, inferior unreal or quasi-real world. When the missing part of it is seen, the upper - i.e. superior, not spacially-higher realm of deity is perceived: it is unitary, volitional + sentient. The fault lies in our lensed percept system + not in reality. By viewing it as a non-spacial journey, Plotinus made it available to this lifetime. (I mean, if you're alive + in your body, how are you going to travel up past the planets one by one?) I see: Ubik stipulated that they are dead + so -so-to-speak inadvertently- has the divine -Ubik- available in the trash level: close at hand. So I'm not dead (v. supra). It's just that Plotinus is right.

Last edit over 5 years ago by Toso

folder 49 - 050
it but not quite. Fairyland, as much as Xtianity. Christ as Fairy King - where is all the Paulline sin & righteousness? The singing girl. Maybe it was the top level of Paradiso - I mean, sorry, Purgatorio - ascent back up the Kabbala Tree of Life through the Sephiroth to Kether. From Malkuth to Kether. I had had the insight that we are dying souls sinking down through the ten Sephiroth. & then at the bottom, having Sephira by Sephira forgotten, due to the Shekhina we remember (anamnesis) & begin our reascent; are born again & start back up, having reached the absolute bottom. The Fairy Queen is Malkuth.

The Miracle of God is that at the bottom (abasement) we encounter God again - as in "Ubik" : the bottom Sephira is the root of the Tree of Life. This is the greatest miracle of all, the secret of return.

Joe Minion

"The one becomes the two." The Godhead splits into two antithetical parts, but the more recent part is empathic, not spiritual. Or rather its empathy leads it into a new region of spirituality where beauty & harmony is sacrificed; this is a paradox : empathy leads into the world of pain & illness & death of the temporary, into an exploration of the ugly side of reality, & there Christ is found. The paradox is resolved if Christ can transmute this ugly world into something more spiritual than "the harmonious fitting-together of the beautiful" i.e. than Kosmos. Like an artist dealing with the seamy & decrepit & sick - here the magic metamorphosis occurs : it is at the core of the seamy, the ill-shaken. Beethoven's later music has an ugly quality about it! There is a mystery here in the basic paradox set-up; the mind knew there was something better than spirituality & beauty. The _rescue_ of the tormented sheep is more than normal beauty. Like an old SF pulp magazine - the trash. Something terribly precious - there is magic, here. You can only see it later.

I wish I could understand. The slap rag music of black shoeshine boys - vs "good music"! "Days of Heaven"!

1) BIP "Tears" world is hell. I was formerly there & remembered it. Past. 2) this world, Purgatorio. 3) the Garden showing through into (2). I will be going there. Paradiso. These 3 realms are co-axial.

folder 49 - 142

folder 49 - 142
The thing is, I remembered (anamnesis) the worse world - & saw it - but did _not_ remember the better world - the Garden world, although later on I did see it. I was never formerly in the Garden world. These worlds have all the aspects of Dante's three worlds (which are probably based on Orphic & Neoplatonist sources). During my lifetimes in _this_ world, Purgatorio, I was adjudicated as exculpated & passed over into what I have called "Post Mortem" experience. Which are actually experiences of the better world Paradiso, & I have found myself in the top level of Purgatorio that Dante describes - the last level of _this_ world. These worlds & their many layers occupy the same space; they are coaxial. As in Dante, I have my psychopomp. Just as once I was taken out of the hell-world, now I am being extricated from this world; the final world shines through it to me, & I am moving toward it.

As I said in my Metz speech, Christ taught how to get across to the next world, Paradiso, while still here. (before dying.) It involved death taking him surrogate instead of you. This fits in with the Golden Fish Sign, etc. Only Christ can arrange to spring you from this world while you're still in it. The purpose of the anamnesis of the previous bad world is to be freed of your two-tape programming to go on to the next one, via the surrogate death by Christ for you.

Breaking the hold of "astral determinism," the two synchronized tapes, is just one part of breaking the hold of this world per se - all of it

Last edit about 9 years ago by erica snowlake

30

time for war + struggle + lucidity. I note in my recent notes that I say that upon the 11-17-80 disclosure of God's infinite love -causing infinite bliss- world is of no importance to me. This would have been a dangerous stance for me to take in 3-74 to 8-74, both in terms of my own safety + life + in terms of historic events; so this may be why I was treated only to a disclosure of superior (supernatural) intelligence, not love. {Note} I don't know, I'm just speculating. But surely I would have withdrawn into an other-worldly stance + not cared about events here, including my own fate. There is a time for each different thing. (This would explain the difference between 2-3-74 + 11-17-80 that Platt noted that caused him to laud the former + stigmatize the latter, so maybe my theorizing is correct; had the theophany of 11-17-80 taken place in 1974 I would have been neutralized + paralyzed in terms of political action.)

{Note:} In other words the true, final, spiritual, otherworldly disclosure -such as is found in Dante's Paradiso toward the end- had to be withheld for 6 more years.

folder 90 - 010
Then there is an occlusion, as Calvin says. And only Christ can lift the occlusion. Burroughs, too, in his own way is right. I was right when I wrote SCANNER. Restored memory, too, is involved. Visual perception, cognitive faculties, memory -- Calvin is right. These are what is known in s-f as "parallel worlds." What I call "coaxial worlds." Today is Good Friday and today I understand this once again, as I did in 1977. Inferno (Track A), Purgatorio (this track, Track B), and Paradiso (Track C, the Kingdom/Kingship). That which is revealed in COMMEDIA; that which the Sufis know.

Christ restored me and then, after one full year, I lost it. O weh! Verlorendes Heimatsland! As Tess correctly said: I relived Adam's Fall, the cruelest fate to overtake a person; to see God and then to see him no longer, to know what I have lost! And then not even, finally, to be able to remember! No wonder I cried when I read about Pan in WILLOWS. It set off memories, that night, and since then I have been bitterly wretched, and wondering why!

I just had a very startling realization. When I saw VALIS, especially what I called "pretextual cause," more was involved than discrete time frames that our minds turn into a flow by the projected modem of causation. I saw the very binary forking that my system envisions: instead of an A, B, C, D, etc. causal train, I saw (which is why I call it "pretextual cause") something initiated on the spot, not derived from antecedent reality; this was, apparently, the one phase amounting to a decision located at that point: newness, so-to-speak, entering ex nihilo (or giving the impression of entering ex nihilo). I saw volition, sentience -- which I've always realized -- but, more, I saw what I now conceive to be a decision, a choice, so that there literally was not, in fact, a causal chain. But since (as my view declares) there is an interruption in the continuity of the reality field, we are perceptually unaware of the disjunction during which, in which, the binary decision-making takes place. So it is possible that my accurate perception -- as if an occlusion had lifted -- was related to my anamnesis, my abnormally remembering the zero spaces between frames. I suppose it could be argued that very simply my neural firing was so rapid that I literally saw these

Indexed
folder 90 - 033
-22-

If there were only yin moves we would have causality, immutable cause and effect; it is yang that interrupts this (also we would have an inexorable decay into entropy and death). So my apperception of the switching to one from zero at the branchings is a perception of the yang world of freedom, in which inexorable determinism is overwhelmed, literally interrupted. Put another way, the perception of a strictly deterministic world is a perception of the yin world where there is causality, but this is not in fact the case. I guess there are three choices possible: (1) Perception of the yin world of immutable cause-and-effect. This would be Inferno, the BIP... and there is no escape. (2) Perception of a mixture of yin and yang; this would be Purgatorio where liberation is possible but only potential. (3) Perception of the yang world of total freedom; this would be paradiso. And this would be the PTG (the middle realm, the mixture of yin and yang, is our normal world; you can sink down from it into the yin world or you can rise to the yang world. This analysis fits Parmenides' absolutely). In respect to this triune division, Parmenides' statement that in a certain crucial sense Form Two, yin, only seems to be real but is in fact illusory is of extreme importance; it is, perhaps, the key to salvation. Like Klingsor's castle, the BIP is somehow illusory; its powers of thrall depend on some kind of occlusion in you, as if the very perception of it causes it to be real; its existence is connected to one's perception of its existence -- as if it has no ontology, no existence-in-itself apart from our perception of it. But then arises the mystifying realization that it enslaves us without us seeing it; paradox upon paradox. My opinion of how it exerts power over us without us seeing it, and without it possessing any intrinsic ontological being, is that what it does is to act to debase and occlude our experience of the pure yang world, the PTG; that is, add the invisible BIP to or over the PTG --which is real-- and you get our mixed world! The yin world, inferno, is, then, for us not a separate world but an occluding film between us and the PTG, cutting us off from it; our world is a composite, one source of which is irreal (as in my two-source cosmology).

Last edit about 9 years ago by Toso
folder 90 - 034
Indexed

Indexed
folder 90 - 034
-23-

Now, this raises a whole new idea: that the BIP having no true existence -- okay: when one perceives it as I did, one is not in fact perceiving a world --at least a genuine world-- but is discriminating the PTG --yang or Form One world-- from the occlusion, extracting the PTG out of the two-source mixture, and I think indeed this is the case. Hence when I saw what I called Acts (which just recently I identified as Track A, an alternate present) I was in fact unscrambling two signals: the PTG Yang world, which is genuinely real, and the occluding delusional "world" of the BIP. This would point to my two-signal (source) cosmogony as being quite correct, but there is more: since only one realm truly exists, the yang or Form One or PTG or Paradiso realm, then inferno, the BIP is totally delusional; our middle realm which is a mixture of the two is half real and half delusional, so that ontologically speaking we are in paradiso always, endlessly, and all that stands between us and knowing this is a deluding curtain (dokos or maya); to say, "I am in hell" cannot, then, be true; what is really meant is, "I believe I am in hell; I experience hell"; but this experience is a demonic delusion, of uncertain origin. Salvation, then, has to do with lifting the occlusion, and this of course coincides totally, absolutely and precisely with 2-3-74. First I unscrambled the two signal-sources and then, finally, I abolished the BIP, the yin world or Form Two source, which in VALIS I stigmatize as noise. Now, this corrolates with Boehme's conception that evil is the no stages in God, which are ultimately rejected by a higher synthesis; which is another way of stating my contention that the yin or zero moves are provisional, tentative, and get cancelled. So all this adds up and is self-authenticating, by virtue of its internal integrity. As to how the deluding, punishing BIP yin signal arises, let me go back at once to my concept of how inauthentic existence consists of an evasion, a flight into time in order to escape --paradoxically!-- time itself, an escape that dreadfully transmutes space (freedom) into tyrannical time, hence causation, which is the instrument of time. One runs right into the BIP, as if it is a punishment for the failure to have the courage to look directly at --and integrate with-- reality.

Last edit over 7 years ago by Toso

Complete
folder 90 - 159
G-104

occlusion, fall. However, one must realize that an irreal world is better than none at all. There is an ambiguity to our situation: it is better than hell but worse than heaven. Hell would be total encapsulation: the mind (soul) provided with no world, no "other" at all; so in relation to hell (no world, no other) our state is a boon, + God is guarantor of world; he has the power to compel us to assent to [representation as] world absolutely, + this is only relatively a misfortune (it is a misfortune compared to paradiso, a mercy compared to hell). Where I am on the vertical axis, I can begin to comprehend him (God), as I did last night especially; irreal world (purgatorio) is beginning to give way to paradiso. This is really a very elaborate structure. There are all degrees + levels, not just hell vs liberation. Each of us has an appropriate realm defined in terms of proximity to or, conversely, distance from God. These are the "coaxial realms" I discerned. Not time-axis but some sort of Neo-Platonist "Commedia" vertical axis. There is some sort of common matrix serving all these hierarchical realms; they all work off it simultaneously + are in some strange way intermingled. They are all here + all now. The key is the medieval Gothic vertical spatial axis linking the lower + upper realms - hence in 3-74 I experienced this "medieval" world. In some very literal, true way heaven is up + hell is down + we are in the middle (hence purgatorio!). The closest I came to really understanding 3-74

Last edit almost 8 years ago by Toso
folder 90 - 160
Indexed

folder 90 - 161
G-105

then was an ascending to paradiso, world gave way to God: God outside me as world, God inside me (i.e. Valis). So to say that "God [Valis] invaded world" is quite wrong; this was my return to God - which is Dante's top realm. The BIP, of course, is the lowest realm, + originally I had been there. (Which is what anamnesis told me.) So my 3-74 experience of "the second signal" can best be understood in terms of the vertical ["spatial"] ascent of the "Commedia". Hence my impression that I had died. The best term for Valis is Rudolf Otto's: "the wholly other." This could also be described as an ascent from ignorance + slavery to knowledge + freedom. Our world is irreal + we generate it ourselves (+ for precisely this reason it can properly be called irreal;) thus in contact with it we experience not the true other but in fact our own thought-formations spun out of our own minds, coming back at us as world. This is the result of an evasive flight in time from reality. Only when we cease to run do we experience the truly other - + break out of our private world. Thus in this world we are literally + conceptually blind. We are not actually dealing with world but with a representation we take to be world, a spurious representation that we ourselves generate. At this level world is encountered as annihilating Fate; from this we flee into time: the very axis along which this irreal world is generated. In a way "real world" is an oxymoron; world as thing is by definition irreal because only God is real. But while you are in it you cannot possibly comprehend it as irreal, since thus comprehending it + escaping (rising above) it cannot be separated: while we are in it our absolute assent to it is compelled by we

K-6 1) Physical reality to language (or information) is like record groove to music. 2) Schizophrenia concreteness to normal abstracting is as normal abstracting to meta-abstracting. 3) sensible world to Logos (+ forms). This is the same as #1. Achieved by the percipient by means of #2. 4) Normal consciousness is machine consciousness. Meta-abstracting is "Anokhi --" full, pure consciousness 5) 3 Distinct divisions of stages of consciousness, not 2. (A) Before Christ: Babylonian Absolute programming : the Law. Christ broke this. (B) the normal consciousness that we know. Some autonomy (C) Pure consciousness: absolute freedom. (A) is familiar to us as schizo phrenic concreteness (hence the schizophrenic is abreactive - a throwback from a prior epoch). (B) ability to abstract. This is the age of the son, as Joachim puts it. Grace + love replace legalism. Mercy replaces the talion law. Judgment replaces inflexible cause-+-effect. Yet - some "occlusion" remains. The "groove" is still experienced (the flux world of particulars). (C) Joachim's third age: of the spirit. Man is totally-inner‐ sensible + physical + substantial,but information (language). (A) is inferno as metal world, machine world of immutable determinism. (B) Purgatorio. Soul enters, & some autonomy & Freedom. (C) Plato + his recovery of the Forms by anamnesis. This s paradiso, referred to by Pythagoras as a world based on number + ratio + harmonic intervals + music, + esp by kosmos which was no substantia but structure: the way the parts fit together.
